phase_name: ad-hoc bug fixes — Suggested tab filter+reject bug

completed_tasks.name: Fix filter+reject: immutable parent updates in ReciterTabs
Fix filter+reject: useEffect re-sync in ReciterTabContent
Attempt to fix package-lock.json for CodeBuild

remaining_tasks.name: Fix package-lock.json by running npm install inside node:20-alpine container

blockers.description: npm ci --frozen-lockfile fails in CodeBuild: Missing string_decoder@1.1.1. Local npm install did not fix it. Needs docker-based regeneration.
blockers.workaround: Run: docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/app -w /app node:20-alpine sh -c 'npm install --legacy-peer-deps', then commit and push package-lock.json

human_actions_pending.action: Run docker-based npm install to fix package-lock.json (see BUILD-ISSUE.md)
human_actions_pending.context: CodeBuild uses node:20-alpine with npm 10.8.2; local npm 10.9.4 does not reproduce the missing string_decoder entry

decisions.decision: Fix ReciterTabs to use immutable setFilteredData(prev => prev.map(...)) instead of splice/push mutation
decisions.rationale: Mutation meant props.publications never got a new reference, so useEffect([props.publications]) in child could never fire
Ensures parent assertion changes always propagate to child local state, re-applying active text filter

next_action: Commit BUILD-ISSUE.md, then run docker-based npm install to regenerate package-lock.json and re-trigger pipeline
context_notes: Bug fix code (064a91f) is correct and pushed. Only blocker is the pre-existing package-lock.json issue that prevents CodeBuild from completing. The fix itself needs to be tested on reciter-dev once the build succeeds.
